items.title: Flutterwave sandbox Naira deposit
items.summary: Run npm run proof:bridge-checkout, complete the sandbox payment, then run npm run proof:bridge-verify.

items.title: Flutterwave sandbox Naira payout request

caveats: Flutterwave is a sandbox Naira bridge only; creator tips settle through Arc/Circle/x402 as USDC.
Flutterwave sandbox payout reached /v3/transfers but requires IP whitelisting before a successful Naira transfer.
